description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a test stage and a .test_template that runs bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --without docs --path vendor then bundle exec rake tests. Add a test:puppet55 job in the test stage that uses the template script and sets variables FACTER_VERSION: ~> 3.11.0 and PUPPET_VERSION: ~> 5.5.10. Add a test:puppetlatest job in the test stage that also uses the template script without extra variables. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
